strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder of open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, and community talks
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise; only brief mention of MCP and agent tooling
No evidence of Director-level IC influence, strategy advisory, or executive-facing work
No advanced degree and limited cloud-platform depth versus role's preferred profile

key_factors.factor: Director-level IC and strategic advisory experience
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, open-source leadership, and a craftsmanship mindset, but the role demands a Director-level IC with deep, recognized AI expertise and a track record of shaping cloud/AI product strategy. The resume shows only nascent AI work (MCP tooling) and no evidence of advising strategic customers, building AI platforms, or operating at a Principal/Director altitude.
